title: KarmicPack 2
description: a decently sized create focused kitchensink pack with mods such as create, productive bees, the bumblezone, alex's caves , alex's mobs, and farmer's delight among others
body:
# KarmicPack 2
A pack by gay trans girls :3

Included is ~200 mods, such as create and a lot of create addons.
Trans girls like stuffed animals, so of course theres also Blåhaj Restitched which adds the cuddly buddies (Sea animals) that we know and love.

This is a tech-focused modpack, with things such as machines and automation. (And nuclear bombs :3)
Want to blow up a village? Build a nuke.
Want to be a cute girl? Create estrogen.

Be who you want, make what you want.

Be gay, do- _FOR LEGAL REASONS I CANNOT FINISH THIS JOKE_.
